description: Context compaction (SPEC §7F): a transcript with tool groups is compacted when it exceeds maxTokens — the older body becomes one summary system message, a recent tail is kept, tool-pair safety holds, and the leading system prompt is preserved verbatim. Encodes C2–C4 of the spike.

input.comment: Build the transcript deterministically so every port produces the same bytes. Start with the systemPrompt, then repeat `userTurns` groups of exactly these four messages (i = 0..userTurns-1).

options.summarize: the deterministic summarizer returns the literal string "summarized <N> messages" where <N> = the count of older messages being summarized (everything between the leading system prompt and the retained tail)
options.countTokens: default estimator: for each message, ceil(len(JSON-serialized message) / 4); sum over messages

expect.toolPairSafe: every message with role 'tool' is preceded (earlier in the result) by an assistant message whose tool_calls contains its tool_call_id — no orphaned tool result

flushToMemoryVariant.expect: the result additionally contains a system message instructing the model to save durable facts with the memory tool, positioned before the retained tail

notes: Below maxTokens the compactor is a NO-OP (returns nothing); the transcript is byte-identical to no compactor — assert this separately with a short transcript (C1).
The tail begins at a USER turn by construction of the split rule; this is what guarantees tool-pair safety.
summarize is deterministic here only so the fixture is checkable; in production it MAY call an LLM.
